overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking up a snowy mountain trail during a stormy dusk. The character traverses through dense pine forests and past ancient stone ruins while ascending toward a mountain summit with panoramic views.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail with wooden fencing

events.description: entering dense forest section from open trail with wooden fence
lighting dims as tree canopy becomes denser overhead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily uphill on mountain path, wearing leather armor with sword on back

entered.detail: weathered wooden fence lining the right side of the mountain path
tall evergreen pine trees scattered along the mountainside
narrow dirt and grass path winding up the mountain slope
steep rocky mountain terrain rising on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on an open snowy mountain trail bordered by a wooden fence on the right and rocky cliffs on the left. As the character walks forward, the environment transitions into a denser forest section around 6 seconds, with lighting gradually dimming as the tree canopy closes overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest path with enclosed canopy

events.description: reaching darkest point of dense forest with minimal sky visibility
emerging from dense forest into more open area with increasing light

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing ascent through dark forest, navigating the winding trail

entered.detail: thick overhead cover of pine branches blocking most sky light
steep rocky terrain rising on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: This segment traverses a densely forested section of the mountain where the canopy blocks most of the stormy sky, creating a dark, enclosed atmosphere. The path winds through tall pines with rocky slopes on both sides, gradually emerging back into more open terrain toward the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain ridge with ancient stone ruins

events.description: exiting forest completely into open mountain vista with stone wall ruins visible
path curves left to follow the mountain ridge line

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the ridge path, passing ancient stone structures while taking in the mountain views

entered.detail: ancient weathered stone wall running alongside the path
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance through the storm
deep valley visible below the ridge line to the right

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dense forest onto an open mountain ridge with expansive views of distant snow-capped peaks. Ancient stone wall ruins line the right side of the path as the trail curves along the ridge, offering panoramic vistas of the valley below despite the stormy weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain summit approach with ancient pillars

events.description: reaching highest elevation with most expansive panoramic views of the mountain range

agents.ego_description: Geralt making final ascent toward the summit, navigating rocky terrain

entered.detail: tall ancient stone pillars and standing stones alongside the path
massive boulders and rock formations lining the left side
distant mountain peaks covered in snow visible through the storm clouds

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the mountain summit through increasingly rocky terrain. Ancient stone pillars and ruins dot the landscape while the path becomes more rugged. The elevation provides the most expansive views of the snow-covered mountain range, with the storm clouds creating a dramatic atmosphere as the character continues the ascent.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent from an open snowy trail through a dark forest and up toward a rugged, panoramic mountain summit. It begins on a path bordered by a wooden fence and rocky cliffs, moving forward as the environment transitions into a dense forest where the tree canopy closes overhead and the lighting dims. The camera then winds through this enclosed atmosphere of tall pines and rocky slopes before gradually emerging back into the open air of a mountain ridge. As the trail curves, the scene expands to reveal ancient stone wall ruins and expansive views of distant snow-capped peaks and the valley below. Finally, the path becomes increasingly rugged and dotted with stone pillars, climbing toward the summit under dramatic storm clouds that frame the vast, snow-covered mountain range.
